headline: 2 Growth Stocks Down 50% to Buy Right Now
summary: Sometimes the best buying opportunities don't announce themselves. They show up dressed as a near-term disaster.

headline: Bernstein Upgrades Deckers Outdoor to Market Perform, Raises Price Target to $100
summary: Bernstein  analyst Aneesha Sherman   upgrades Deckers Outdoor (NYSE:DECK) from Underperform to Market Perform and raises the price target from $90 to $100.
